violations.text: At the time of inspection, the kitchen area hand sink was observed with a strainer with pasta in it. A HANDWASHING SINK may not be used for purposes other than handwashing. Strainer with Pasta was removed by the employee. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/29/2025

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. At the time of inspection, calzones were observed placed in the display refrigerator unit prior to be cooled to 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below (see temperatures). Calzones were moved to the walk-in cooler for rapid cooling at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/29/2025

Food items packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels with complete information. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, list of allergens, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. New Violation. Correct By: 04/29/2025

A large knife used for cutting cheesecakes was observed stored between the pastry low boy cooler and the wall. Clean equipment is to be stored in a way to prevent the possible contamination of the food contact surface(s). (Knife was removed for proper storage at the time of inspection.) Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/29/2025

Food contact surfaces of the ice machine were observed with an accumulation of biofilm/debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine was turned off and set for proper cleaning, and Ice was voluntarily disposed of at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/20/2024

At the time of inspection, scoops being used in containers of dry ingredients were observed to be stored with the handles in the food. Utensils used to dispense non-time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods such as sugar and flour must be stored in the food item with their handles above the top of the food within the container. Scoops were adjusted at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/20/2024
The facility is lacking thermo-labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the High Temp. Dish Machine. New Violation. Correct By: 03/27/2024
